description_long: This is a three-seater sofa upholstered in rich brown leather, featuring a sleek, modern design. The seat and back cushions are generously padded and uniformly sized, providing a structured and comfortable appearance. The armrests are straight and at the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette with clean lines. The sofa stands on four short, cylindrical legs, which are dark in color and slightly recessed, giving the piece a floating effect. The leather upholstery is smooth and has a subtle sheen, with visible stitching outlining the cushion edges. The overall look is contemporary and refined, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern brown leather three-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and short, dark cylindrical legs. The design is sleek, structured, and visually refined.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's structured, boxy silhouette.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight armrest, the depth of the seat, and the short, dark cylindrical legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous leather backrest and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the sofa's back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and cushion depth, with visible stitching and leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and aligned in a single row.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, fully upholstered in brown leather with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs, dark in color, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed for a floating effect.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, padded back cushions and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown leather upholstery with a smooth texture and visible stitching along the cushion edges.
